name: hugo-artifacts-tooling
description: Top-level dev-tooling for the hugo-artifacts monorepo. Pins the ESLint v9 + Prettier 3 + typescript-eslint v8 baseline so consumers can add eslint.config and .prettierrc files without re-deriving versions. Not a publishable package; the field 'private' is true.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run lint:md
